reviews.comment:
Hace diez años q no cambia nada. Pésima atención de los playeros . Trabaja uno y el resto usa el celular ....dentro de la zona de cargo ....peligro para todos aparte de la demora constante en atender a la gente

(Translated by Google)
Nothing has changed in ten years. The service from the attendants is terrible. One of them actually works, and the rest are on their cell phones... inside the loading zone... a danger to everyone, not to mention the constant delays in serving customers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZektiQUxREAE
